name: Non-Highway Use Fuel Tax Refund

eligibility.description: Applies to gasoline used in the nonbusiness use of small-engine outdoor power equipment or recreational motorboats.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Provides for the transfer of funds for refunds to taxpayers who paid gasoline taxes for fuel used in motorboats or small-engine outdoor power equipment.
